mentions.raw_name: Belt studded with garnets and yellow topaz
Elenei (legendary daughter of sea god and wind goddess)
Bryce (unnamed surname; assigned the left wing)
Three unnamed Winterfell men (dicing with Hal Mollen)
R'hllor / Lord of Light (Stannis's adopted faith; red priestess present; fiery heart sigil; sect numerous in Free Cities and the east, few in the Seven Kingdoms)
Faith of the Seven (implied — sept mentioned for prayer; "laws of the Seven Kingdoms")
Children of the forest (legendary — some say they helped Durran build Storm's End)
Southron lords (referenced by Stannis — the power he needs)
Free Cities (where the red priestess sect is numerous)
Sellswords (part of Stannis's host per Renly)
Lightbringer (Stannis's glowing sword; ruby in hilt)
Renly's crown (golden roses, jade stag's head)
Stannis's banner (sun-yellow; fiery heart with crowned stag within)
Siege towers and catapults (Stannis's; built from felled trees)
Stannis's letter (declaring Joffrey, Tommen, Myrcella bastards born of incest; sent to lords across the realm)

mentions.raw_name: Lightbringer's supernatural glow (gleams strangely bright — now red, now yellow, now blazing white; air shimmers as from heat; "some of the light seemed to go out of the world" when sheathed)
War of the Five Kings (ongoing — referenced through troop positions and multiple competing kings)
Robert's Rebellion (referenced — Ned lifting siege of Storm's End; Lords Tyrell and Redwyne held Stannis prisoned)
Siege of Storm's End (current — Stannis besieging the castle held by Ser Cortnay Penrose)
Battle of the Whispering Wood (Catelyn was present there)
King (claimed by Stannis, Renly, Robb, and Joffrey)
Hand of the King (Stannis says he should have been Robert's Hand; Ned held it)
